'''''Electra''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Electra'' entered the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]] near [[XQ1 Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]'' in the final Rebel engagement against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. Heavy fighting had erupted between, then [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]], [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] task force consisting of [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]'', Platform ''NL-1'', [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV-1 Patrol Craft]] [[Ranger (IPV-1 System Patrol Craft)|''Ranger'']], and various [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was among [[Imperial pilot]]s fighting for the Empire during the engagement, breaking off to inspect ''Electra'', revealing the Rebel Advisors onboard. Stele disabled the shuttle for the capture by Imperial [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Stormtrooper Transport]] [[Shark (transport)|''Shark'']].
